creator: drtr0jan@yandex.ru
text:
Created attachment 235250
ping_exporter.diff

(In reply to Nuno Teixeira from comment #2)

Thx, of course.

* Updated to v1.0.0
* Switched to GO_MODULE
* Fixed "Run as non-root user" ( https://github.com/czerwonk/ping_exporter/issues/56 ) by setuid bit.
* Added ping_exporter_syslog_output_* params to rc-script for syslog output tuning.
